name: libnumber-compare-perl
title: libnumber-compare-perl
summary: module for performing numeric comparisons in Perl
description:
module for performing numeric comparisons in Perl
Number::Compare allows one to compile a simple comparison to an anonymous
subroutine, which can then be called with a value to be tested against.
.
The advantage of using this module is that it understands both the SI prefixes
'k', 'M', and 'G', as well as the IEC binary prefixes 'Ki', 'Mi' and 'Gi'.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use libnumber-compare-perl because module for performing numeric comparisons in Perl.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use libnumber-compare-perl as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair libnumber-compare-perl with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `libnumber-compare-perl --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
